entities.name: PIGEONPEA
entities.description: Cultivated pigeon pea (Cajanus cajan), an important protein source for marginal and vegetarian populations

entities.name: STERILITY MOSAIC DISEASE
entities.description: Also known as green plague of pigeonpea, a severe threat causing yield loss

entities.name: SMD RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of pigeonpea cultivars to resist Sterility Mosaic Disease

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The production output of pigeonpea, which is severely reduced by Sterility Mosaic Disease

entities.name: RILS
entities.description: Recombinant Inbred Lines used to study the inheritance of SMD resistance

entities.name: LEAF STAPLING TECHNIQUE
entities.description: A technique used to screen RILs for SMD resistance

entities.name: PJTSAU
entities.description: The location (Green house, IBT, PJTSAU) where the screening was conducted

entities.name: KHARIF SEASON
entities.description: The agricultural season during 2012 and 2013 when screening took place

entities.name: DIGENIC RATIO
entities.description: The 9S:7R ratio observed for SMD resistance in RILs

entities.name: COMPLEMENTARY GENE ACTION
entities.description: The genetic mechanism indicated by the digenic ratio for SMD resistance

entities.name: PERCENT DISEASE INCIDENCE
entities.description: A metric used to classify RILs as resistant or susceptible based on a 20% threshold

entities.name: ICP 8863
entities.description: A susceptible parent cultivar of pigeonpea

entities.name: ICPL 20097
entities.description: A resistant parent cultivar of pigeonpea

relationships.description: was the time period for screening
